'''''Realm of Death''''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] that was part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|armada]] set to be dispatched to the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Calamari system]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]] to [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|battle]] the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|forces]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. Before leaving with the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], ''Realm of Death'' participated in the Yuuzhan Vong sendoff for the armada in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]].

==Description==
''Realm of Death'' was a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]-equipped [[Warship/Legends|warship]] that featured [[Mica (mineral)|mica]] [[Viewport/Legends|viewports]]. The warship's decks were made of [[yorik coral]].<ref name="Unifying" />

==History==
[[File:Coruscant-EotE.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The ''Realm of Death'' was present in Yuuzhan'tar's orbit for a fleet sendoff in 29 ABY.]]
''Realm of Death'' operated as part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|Yuuzhan Vong armada]]<ref name="Unifying" /> in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' to [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]].</ref> during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Unifying" /> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="ERC" /> in preparation for the [[Fleet/Legends|armada's]] departure to the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Calamari system]] and planned attack on the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] at the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], ''Realm of Death'' and the fleet were present in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]] for a sendoff.<ref name="Unifying" />

For the ceremony, ''Realm of Death'' was branded with the emblem of its [[domain]] and adorned with the [[Blood/Legends|blood]] from sacrificed Galactic Alliance captives like the other warships of the fleet. The vessel's [[Officer/Legends|officers]] knelt in subservience with their right [[Limb/Legends|fists]] pressed to the deck while [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]] recited a prayer for victory from his [[holy yacht]]. When the sendoff was complete, the warship left Yuuzhan'tar's orbit and entered [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] with the rest of the armada as it began its journey to the targeted Calamari [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="Unifying" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Realm of Death'' appeared in [[James Luceno]]'s [[2003]] novel [[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force|''The Unifying Force'']], the last novel in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series.<ref name="Unifying" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
